task_description:
You are a data engineer setting up cross-function file sharing on Modal using a NetworkFileSystem. Create a Modal app at `/home/user/modal_project/app.py` named `nfs-demo`.

Create a Modal NetworkFileSystem (NFS) named `shared-fs` using `modal.NetworkFileSystem.from_name('shared-fs', create_if_missing=True)`.

Define a function `write_shared_file` decorated with `@app.function(network_file_systems={'/shared': nfs})` that writes the string `'hello from nfs'` to `/shared/message.txt`.

Define a function `read_shared_file` decorated with `@app.function(network_file_systems={'/shared': nfs})` that reads `/shared/message.txt` and returns its contents as a string.

Define a `@app.local_entrypoint()` named `main` that calls `write_shared_file.remote()`, then `read_shared_file.remote()`, and writes the result to `/home/user/modal_project/nfs_output.txt`.

Deploy using `modal deploy /home/user/modal_project/app.py --env modal-vsdatagen`.
Run using `modal run /home/user/modal_project/app.py --env modal-vsdatagen`.
Verify the app is listed and `/home/user/modal_project/nfs_output.txt` exists containing `hello from nfs`.
truth:
File: /home/user/modal_project/app.py
Modal App name: nfs-demo
NFS: modal.NetworkFileSystem.from_name('shared-fs', create_if_missing=True)
Function write_shared_file with @app.function(network_file_systems={'/shared': nfs}) writes 'hello from nfs' to /shared/message.txt
Function read_shared_file with @app.function(network_file_systems={'/shared': nfs}) reads /shared/message.txt and returns contents
Local entrypoint main() calls write then read, writes result to /home/user/modal_project/nfs_output.txt
nfs_output.txt must contain: hello from nfs
Deploy: modal deploy /home/user/modal_project/app.py --env modal-vsdatagen
Run: modal run /home/user/modal_project/app.py --env modal-vsdatagen
App 'nfs-demo' in modal app list --env modal-vsdatagen
